text: People are sitting on chairs, and one person is on a cell phone.
Two giraffes standing in a field together in front of rocks and trees.
Bananas or plantains loaded in a canoe at the water's edge.
A family happily eats together with smile son their faces
Three men are in the water carrying surf boards.
A red and white fire hydrant next to a pole surrounded by flowers.
A sculture resembling a chalice with trees in the background.
Partial flooding of street and sidewalk from a fire hydrant.
There are many cars and trucks on a street.
Two older men stand by kitchen counter with pots and Christmas dishes
